productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Stripes Grey Polo T-shirts

The appliqued logo on the left chest adds an interesting detail to the tee, while the cotton keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or chinos and comfortable-yet-stylish lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-18.5"
